title: “I spent $50,000 self-hosting AI models. You should too.” - 0xSero
summary: 0xSero recommends self-hosting AI models, citing their $50,000 investment in local infrastructure. The video discusses local AI deployment options, specific models, and tools for running AI systems on personal hardware rather than relying on cloud services.
writeup: In this video, 0xSero makes the case for self-hosting AI models on personal hardware instead of relying on cloud services, drawing on a stated $50,000 investment in local infrastructure. The discussion covers local AI deployment options, specific models, and tools for running AI systems locally. The framing matters for anyone weighing local inference against managed cloud providers on cost and control.
